title: RAVIAD iPhone Cable Short [1FT/30CM, MFi Certified] Nylon Braided iPhone Charger Cable USB Fast Charging Lightning Cable for iPhone 13 12 11 Pro Max X XS XR 10 8 8 7 Plus 6 6s 5s 5 SE 2020 - Black
features: [MFi-Certified]: iPhone's smart chip ensures that your iPhone devices could sync and charge at full speed safely as orginal iPhone Cable. No warning message pops up at all.

[Perfect Compatibility]: iPhone Charging Cable compatibility with iPhone 11 Pro Max/ 11 Pro/ 11, iPhone XR/ XS Max/ XS/ X, iPhone 8 / 8 Plus, iPhone 7 / 7 Plus, iPhone 6s Plus / 6s / 6 Plus / 6, iPhone 5s / 5c / 5 / SE 2020, as well as the latest iOS system.
[30CM iPhone Charger Cable]: 30CM lightning cable is suitable for a wide range of everyday connection requirements, whether at home, in your car, in the office or while traveling.

[Built to Last]: Triple-Braided Nylon fiber, the most flexible, powerful and durable material, makes tensile force increased by 200%, iPhone Charger Cable can bear 25000+ bending test. Premium Aluminum housing makes the cable more durable.
【Safe and Reliable】Our RAVIAD Lightning Cable integrates multiple protection functions to ensure extra safety - so you and your family can charge your devices worry-free at any time.
description: Product Description Fast Syncing and Charging RAVIAD Lightning Charger Cable supports safe rapid charging (up to 2.4A) and super fast data transfer (480Mbps).
